{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Wandering Titan appearance
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Wandering Titan]] is a massive humanoid figure made of dark stone.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2">''Bloodline'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Lifeforms]]
